title: Greek Salad
description: The famous greek salad of crispy lettuce, peppers, olives and Chicago style feta cheese, garnished with crunchy garlic and rosemary croutons.

title: Bruschetta
description: Our Bruschetta is made from grilled bread that has been smeared with garlic and seasoned with salt and olive oil.

title: Grilled Fish
description: Barbequed catch of the day with red onion, crisp capers, chive creme fraiche and a hint of lemon.

title: Pasta
description: Penne with fried aubergines, tomato sauce, fresh chili, garlic, basil and salted ricotta cheese.

title: Lemon Dessert
description: Light and fluffy traditional homemade Italian Lemon and ricotta cake.
